subject: update schema service version 1.13.3 and upgrade to v31
commit_message:
update schema service version 1.13.3 and upgrade to v31

- Updated schema service dependency version 1.13.3
- Applied v31 schema updates to AAI babel
- Bump up aai-babel to 1.14.0
- Updated Babel test cases after re-enabling XSD generation in schema-service.

Issue-ID: AAI-4207
Change-Id: I596cf54c6c3204343a0702fdcc8f0329afe2caa7
Signed-off-by: akshay.khairnar@t-systems.com <akshay.khairnar@t-systems.com>
